case_title: BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA, INC.DBA BENEFICIAL VS FULLWOOD, GEORGE B.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-07-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-11-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
